articleTitle: Big Bad Wolf: The Wolf's Revenge
introSection: Big Bad Wolf: The Wolf's Revenge is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Busch Gardens Williamsburg in Williamsburg, Virginia, USA. It is a Family Coaster built by Bolliger & Mabillard.

sections.title: Opening
sections.content: Big Bad Wolf: The Wolf's Revenge opened on May 16, 2025 for member previews. It opened to the public on May 23.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: Big Bad Wolf: The Wolf's Revenge is themed to a wolf chasing citizens. During the Festival of the Silent Bells, many people forgot about the town's past. Of course, the wolf comes and chases them. The ride vehicle is themed to a wolf.

fullText:
Big Bad Wolf: The Wolf's Revenge is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Busch Gardens Williamsburg in Williamsburg, Virginia, USA. It is a Family Coaster built by Bolliger & Mabillard.

Big Bad Wolf: The Wolf's Revenge opened on May 16, 2025 for member previews. It opened to the public on May 23.

Big Bad Wolf: The Wolf's Revenge is themed to a wolf chasing citizens. During the Festival of the Silent Bells, many people forgot about the town's past. Of course, the wolf comes and chases them. The ride vehicle is themed to a wolf.
